Notes: * Series: 65th meeting. Stockton leads all-time series, 50-14. Stockton has
won 29 of the last 31. NJCU defeats Stockton in Jersey City for first time
since November 28, 1998. NJCU snaps a 58-game conference losing streak; NJCU
wins first NJAC game since Feb. 18, 2015 vs. Rutgers-Camden.
Game.Location: Jersey City, NJ (John J. Moore AFC)
Game.Officials: Tracy Brock, Troy Smikle, Fran Forenza

LastPlays.Narrative: 23 Mya Neal IN; 04 Jesenia Montalvo OUT
10 Madison Noordeloos IN; 32 Raquel Harris-Scott OUT
